description: An all-time favourite accessory, belts form an integral part of dressing - be it to secure your trousers, or act as a styling detail to your outfit. This Leatherette belt from fastrack is set to pump up your style and add zing to your attire. Made of Leatherette for durability and style Cut design to increase the smartness quotient Tang clasp to offer a snug Fit and to hold the belt in place Holes to customise fit Brand name embossed on the loop Care Use a brass polisher to maintain buckle shine Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust
